scene_summary: Abd al-Muttalib, near the end of his life, entrusts his orphaned grandson Muhammad to the care of his son Abu Talib.
key_visual_action: Abd al-Muttalib, seated and frail with age, places his hand on Abu Talib's shoulder while young Muhammad stands nearby, holding Abu Talib's other hand
setting: Inside a tent or simple room in Makkah, modest furnishings, warm lamplight suggesting evening
emotional_tone: tender, solemn, a passing of responsibility between generations

scene_summary: Young Muhammad is given the choice to stay with Zayd or be sold back to his father; Zayd chooses to remain, and Muhammad declares him family before the Quraysh.
key_visual_action: Muhammad (shown from behind, identifiable by his cloak) holds Zayd's hand and raises it before a small gathering near the Kaaba, declaring him family
setting: Open courtyard near the Kaaba in Makkah, sandy ground, simple stone structures in the background

scene_summary: Abu Bakr purchases Zunayrah's freedom from her cruel master, ending her suffering as a persecuted slave.
key_visual_action: Abu Bakr handing coins to a disgruntled slave-owner while gently helping Zunayrah, who is now free, to her feet
setting: A dusty marketplace street in Makkah, simple mudbrick buildings, a few onlookers in the distance
emotional_tone: relief, quiet justice, compassion overcoming cruelty

scene_summary: Abu Bakr's father questions why he frees only weak slaves instead of strong ones who could protect him; Abu Bakr explains he seeks only God's reward.
key_visual_action: Abu Bakr standing calmly with his hand over his heart, speaking to his seated, puzzled father in their home
setting: Modest sitting area inside a Makkan home, simple woven mats and cushions
emotional_tone: conviction, quiet sincerity, generational contrast in values

scene_summary: After the Battle of Khaybar, the Prophet gently reproaches Bilal for leading two young women past the bodies of the fallen, teaching mercy even toward one's enemies.
key_visual_action: The Prophet (shown from behind, in his green cloak) speaking earnestly to a remorseful Bilal, with two young women standing slightly apart, visibly shaken
characters_present: Safiyyah bint Huyayy (modestly dressed, face may be shown or veiled per your standard rule)
setting: Open desert terrain near Khaybar, simple tents in the distance, late afternoon light
